description: Computes the intersection (logical AND) of clippable shapes. Returns the overlapping region of all input shapes. Useful for creating lens-shaped regions, overlapping areas, and geometric intersections.
utility: Find the overlapping region of multiple shapes

alternates.description: Intersection of three or more shapes

examples.expression:
G = g2d()
C1 = circle(G, 3, 0, 0)
C2 = circle(G, 3, 4, 0)
I = and(G, C1, C2)

G = g2d()
C1 = circle(G, 3, 0, 0)
C2 = circle(G, 3, 3, 0)
C3 = circle(G, 3, 1.5, 2.5)
I = and(G, C1, C2, C3)
